---
title: "Classroom files"
author: "Dr. Bartosiak"
---

Here you will find files used in the classroom examples.

## Basics

- [Excel 1](/_files/class/1.xlsx){target="_blank"}
- [Excel 2](/_files/class/2.xlsx){target="_blank"}
- [Excel 3](/_files/class/3.xlsx){target="_blank"}

## Statistical Analysis

- [Statistical Analysis 1](/_files/class/Statistical_Analysis_1.xlsx){target="_blank"}
- [Statistical Analysis 2](/_files/class/Statistical_Analysis_2.xlsx){target="_blank"}

## Data visualization

- [Scatterplot](/_files/class/Scatterplot-conditions.xlsx){target="_blank"}
- [Exercises - slides](/_files/class/Exercises-slides.pptx){target="_blank"}
- [Exercise 3 - workbook](/_files/class/Exercise3.xlsx){target="_blank"}
- [Exercise 4 - workbook](/_files/class/Exercise4.xlsx){target="_blank"}


------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.disclaimer {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #666;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding-top: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div>
  {{< include footer.html >}}
</div>
```
